title: Add explicit elevation profiles
goal: Replace trusted-owner-as-default assumptions with explicit profile/elevation semantics for observation, normal mutation, captain-level high-impact action and full trusted-owner break-glass use.

acceptance.assertion: Profiles are documented and represented as core-observer, operator-mutator, captain and trusted-owner or equivalent explicit tiers.
Default ChatGPT-facing operation is read-mostly and does not rely on the OpenAI platform filter as the primary safety boundary.
Mutating and high-impact paths require explicit allow_mutation or captain gates, expected target evidence, recovery readiness where applicable, and audit receipts.
grabowski_status or contract drift exposes the active profile, enabled capabilities, forbidden capabilities and profile/tool mismatches.
Tests cover forbidden default access to high-risk tools, successful explicit elevation for allowed narrow grips, recovery-gated captain behavior and profile mismatch diagnostics.

metadata.source: User requested phases 1-4 from the 2026-07-08 Grabowski optimization plan be registered as Bureau tasks.
metadata.live_basis: trusted-owner currently exposes broad read/write roots and high-risk capabilities; recovery is green but should remain a gate, not a blanket authorization.
